_note: Live defaults (conservative threshold so honest students aren't false-accused). Run `uv run tune_detection.py --generate 8` (or --from-cekura RUN_ID) to retune flag_threshold + followup_aggressiveness from labeled data; results append to eval_log.json. A prior local run improved F1 0.55->0.80 by lowering the threshold at the cost of precision (FPR 0.0->0.5) — see eval_log.json.
